text.title: Dev Methodologies — Architecture Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the rubric artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-dev-methodologies-architecture.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: missing required service; patterns minItems=6; id enum violation; status enum violation.
